decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) was stale SCHEDULED (scheduled 2026-06-15T12:00Z) in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed HTTP 200 (title 'Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run? — Mary Celeste 1872 #shorts', author Voidline). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Catalogue is now 100% live: 11/11 Shorts PUBLIC, none SCHEDULED.

PIPELINE FULLY DRY. Today Sat 2026-06-27 is not a publish day (cadence: Shorts Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun, Long-form Sun 17:00). Next 3 days all empty: Sun 06-28 (long-form + Reddit-seed + Shorts day per cadence) has NO long-form and NO Short queued; Mon 06-29 (Shorts day) empty; Tue 06-30 empty. Nothing scheduled since v1_bonus_briggs on 06-15 — a 12-day content gap. Also: agent-log has no DAILY_PLAN between 2026-06-13 and today (14-day routine gap). v4 Roanoke still blocked on Google Flow thumb submit (see LEARNINGS 06-13). No Reddit seed drafted today (today is not the long-form day, and no long-form is queued for tomorrow to seed). ACTION NEEDED: produce + schedule next batch and queue the Sunday long-form before the rhythm fully collapses.
